# Open Magi Agent Docs

Magi Agent is the programmable AI agent runtime for local work under user-controlled rules.

Quick install:

```bash
brew install --force-bottle openmagi/tap/magi-agent
magi-agent serve --port 8080
open http://localhost:8080/dashboard
magi --help
magi-agent --help
```

Read these public docs in order:

1. docs/README.md - Open Magi Agent Docs
2. docs/getting-started.md - Getting Started
3. docs/quickstart.md - Quickstart
4. docs/cli.md - CLI
5. docs/configuration.md - Configuration
6. docs/customization.md - Customization
7. docs/runtime.md - Runtime
8. docs/tools.md - Tools
9. docs/recipes.md - Recipes
10. docs/harnesses.md - Harnesses
11. docs/first-party-packs.md - First-party Packs
12. docs/contracts.md - Contracts
13. docs/hooks.md - Hooks
14. docs/memory.md - Memory
15. docs/skills.md - Skills
16. docs/automation.md - Automation
17. docs/streaming-events.md - Streaming Events
18. docs/integrations.md - Integrations
19. docs/api.md - API
20. docs/deployment.md - Deployment
21. docs/security.md - Security
22. docs/architecture.md - Architecture
23. docs/reference.md - Reference
24. docs/troubleshooting.md - Troubleshooting
